creator: airat@0907.ru
text:
Automation reboot with connected wireless keyboard & mouse - Genius KB600.
Last message is

vga0:<Generic ISA VGA> at port 0x3c0-0x3df iomem 0xa0000 0xbffff on isa0
panic:ohci_add_done addr 0x77ef1700 not found
cpuid=0
Automation reboot in 15sec - press key on the console to abort 

When I plug this device after system loaded - all ok.

Motherboard ASUS M2A-VM.

Fix: 

?
How-To-Repeat: 1. Shutdown system.
2. Plug Genius KB600.
3. Startup system.
